notes.text: Marlin lives in anxious routine, overprotecting Nemo after traumatic loss.
Nemo is taken by divers, forcing Marlin to confront his deepest fear.
Marlin leaves safety and crosses the ocean with Dory to find Nemo.
They face sharks, jellyfish, and uncertain clues while learning to trust others.
Marlin finds a path toward Nemo's location and Nemo finds agency in the fish tank.
The cost: Marlin must release control and risk loss to truly connect.
Marlin returns to Nemo and together they face the net crisis.
Marlin changes: he trusts Nemo's capability, becoming a more open and resilient father.
